headline: Meathead's Son Nick SLASHES Parents 😱🔪 in Hollywood Horror Show 💥🍑
text:
Rob 'Meathead' Reiner 👴🎥 and wifey Michele 📸💅 got YEETED 🔪💀 by their own spawn Nick Reiner 32yo psycho 😈🪓 in LA crib – now bro's CHAINED UP ⛓️😩 facing DOUBLE FIRST-DEGREE MURDER 🍆🔪 charges like a Spinal Tap solo gone WRONG 🎸💥! Siblings Jake & Romy 😢👫 dropping TEARS ☕💦: 'UNIMAGINABLE PAIN 😰🍑 after HORRIFIC LOSS 🤯 – Mom & Dad weren't just parents, they were BESTIES 👯‍♂️❤️!' No shade on bro Nick tho 👀🤐, just BEGGING privacy 🙏🚫 and 'REMEMBER the LOVE 🎭💕 they SLAYED with!' 

Nick pops in court Wednesday 🏛️⚖️, WAIVES plea like 'NAH LATER' 🙅‍♂️📅 – arraignment PUSHED to Jan 7 ❄️⏰ cuz docs said he wasn't CLEARED 🏥🚫! Rocking suicide smock 👕🚫💀, arms BARE & SHACKLED ⛓️👐, face BLANK 😶 like Misery's ghost 👻📖 – Judge Theresa 'NO CAMS' McGonigle 👩‍⚖️📵 bans media snaps outside courthouse paparazzi FRENZY 📸😡! Lawyer Alan Jackson 💼🗣️ spills: 'COMPLEX ISSUES 🤔🔍, no RUSH TO JUDGMENT 🚫⚡ – give the SYSTEM DIGNITY 🛡️👨‍⚖️ and fam some BREATH 🫁!' 

Psych eval incoming? 🧠💊 Seth Zuckerman spilling BBC tea ☕: 'Check if dude's FIT TO STAND TRIAL 🏋️‍♂️⚖️ before the BIG SHOWDOWN 👊!' Locked in Twin Towers jail 🏰🚔 till Jan – if GUILTY 😈, LIFE NO PAROLE 🔒♾️ or DEATH PENALTY ⚰️💉 on table, but prosecutors like 'TBD 🤷‍♂️🔪!' 

Meathead directed ICONS like This is Spinal Tap 🤘🎤 (11/10 amps 😂), Misery 😱🔨, A Few Good Men 🎖️🍆 – 'YOU CAN'T HANDLE THE TRUTH... OR THE KNIFE! 🗡️😩' Michele was actress-producer 📹👑 founding Reiner Light ✨ – Hollywood ROYALS 💎 slain by SON 😱👶🔪! LAPD Chief Jim McDonnell 😢🚨: 'HEARTBREAKING for Reiner fam AND LA 🏙️💔!' Fans flooding condolences 🌹💐 from all walks – but Nick's the ULTIMATE PLOT TWIST 🎬🤯 in this family ORGY of TRAGEDY 💦😢! No rush bby, justice BRRRRR ⚖️🔥 but slow-cook that psyco eval 🧠🍲! #ReinerRageQuit 🍑💥
